# Kaimakki Studio

## What we do
Kaimakki Studio is a done-for-you short-form video production service. Clients pick a video "recipe" (template), film footage on their phone following our shot list, and we edit it into a polished, scroll-stopping video.

## How it works
1. Pick a recipe — choose a video template that fits your goal
2. Film your footage — we send a shot list, you film on your phone
3. We edit — our team turns your footage into a finished video
4. You post — get your video back and post it

## The twist
You pay upfront. If you don't ship your footage or post the video within 30 days, we donate part of your prepayment to charity. Tough love that keeps you accountable.

## Pricing
- Video recipes start from around EUR 49
- The more you post, the less you pay — lifetime volume discounts
- First order includes a free Strategy + Branding session

## Industries we serve
- Real Estate: property tours, listing videos, agent branding
- Personal Brands: tips, stories, opinion content
- Product Businesses: launches, demos, unboxings
- Service Businesses: case studies, behind-the-scenes, testimonials
- Hospitality: restaurant showcases, menu videos, café and hotel content
- Fitness & Wellness: transformations, workout tips, studio content
- Events: recaps, teasers, promo reels for DJs, photographers, planners
- Medicine: educational content, patient testimonials, practice branding
- Artists & Craftsmen: process videos, portfolio showcases, behind-the-scenes
- Sport: highlights, training content, event recaps
- Fashion: launches, lookbooks, styling content
